diagrams.title: Three Pillars of Sustainable Software
diagrams.description: Shows the three key dimensions: Energy Efficiency, Carbon Efficiency, and Hardware Efficiency
elements: Energy Efficiency - optimized algorithms, efficient data structures
Carbon Efficiency - carbon-aware computing, renewable energy usage
Hardware Efficiency - virtualization, extended hardware lifecycle
diagrams.purpose: Understanding core principles of sustainable software design

diagrams.title: ICT Carbon Footprint Comparison
diagrams.description: Pie chart comparing ICT sector emissions (2-4%) with aviation industry
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the significant environmental impact of ICT

diagrams.title: Carbon-aware Computing Workflow
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how carbon-aware applications schedule workloads based on energy carbon intensity
diagrams.purpose: Understanding temporal scheduling for reduced carbon footprint

diagrams.title: Software Energy Optimization Levels
diagrams.description: Pyramid showing different levels at which software energy efficiency can be optimized
diagrams.purpose: Understanding multi-level approach to energy optimization

diagrams.title: Virtualization Benefits for Green Computing
diagrams.description: Diagram showing physical server vs virtualized server resource utilization
elements: Virtualized Server: Multiple VMs, high utilization
Benefits: Energy savings, reduced hardware, less heat
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how virtualization improves resource efficiency
